tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Nothings Gonna Change My Love For You

content:
[Intro]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Ab/C[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Db2[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
[ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Ab/C[/ch] [ch]Bbm7[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch] [ch]Db2[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]B2[/ch]                                 [ch]Bsus2/D#[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch]
   You know our love was meant to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]             [ch]G#m/F#[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F#/E[/ch]
   The kind of love to last forever[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                             [ch]Bsus2/D#[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch]
   And I want you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]         [ch]G#m/F#[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
   From tonight until the end of time[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#/A#[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
You should know[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#/G[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]
Always on my mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#/F[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
In my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#/G[/ch]   [ch]G#[/ch]   [ch]A#[/ch]
In my soul, Baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Ebsus2/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
You're the meaning in my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're the inspiration[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                 [ch]Ebsus2/G[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]
 You bring feeling to my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]              [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb/Ab[/ch]
You're the inspiration[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]                [ch]Db/Gb[/ch]
   Wanna have you near me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Cb/Gb[/ch]                  [ch]Cbm/Gb[/ch]
I wanna have you hear me sayin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb/Db[/ch]                        [ch]Dbsus2[/ch] [ch]Db7[/ch]  [ch]F#sus4/E[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
 "No one needs you more than I      need you"[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]B[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]B/D#[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E2[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
And I know (And I know)[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Bsus2/D#[/ch] [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Yes I know that it's plain to see[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]       [ch]G#m/F#[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#/E[/ch]
   So in love when we're together[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]
Now I know (Now I know)[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Bsus2/D#[/ch]  [ch]D#m7[/ch]
That I need you here with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]G#m/F#[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]

[Pre-Chorus]

Oh___________ Oh      Oh[/tab]
